title: The Straw Hat Promise
description: On pages 48–51, this part follows the Romance Dawn flashback and focuses on how Luffy’s pirate dream is formed through Shanks, Higuma, and the straw hat promise.
scene: Shanks leaves Luffy with the straw hat, turning their farewell into a promise about the future.

dialogue.speaker: Makino
dialogue.text: It's a small price to pay...

dialogue.speaker: Makino
dialogue.text: Just an ARM...

dialogue.speaker: Makino
dialogue.text: I'm just glad you're okay.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Luffy understood why shanks wouldn't take him out to sea.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: THE DANGERS OF THE SEA WERE TOO GREAT...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: AND HE WAS NOT YET STRONG ENOUGH...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: BUT MOST OF ALL, LIFFY REALIZED WHAT A GREAT MAN SHANKS WAS.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: HE VOWED TO BE JUST LIKE HIM ONE DAY.

dialogue.speaker: Makino
dialogue.text: So you won't be coming back to this village after this voyage?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: That's right.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: WE'VE BEEN USING THIS HARBOR AS A BASE OF OFFATIONS FOR A LONG TIME. MAYBE TOO LONG.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Are you sad?

dialogue.speaker: Makino
dialogue.text: YEAH, I'M SAD...

dialogue.speaker: Makino
dialogue.text: BUT I WON'T ASK YOU TO TAKE ME WITH YOU!

dialogue.speaker: Makino
dialogue.text: I'VE DECIDED TO BECOME A PIRATE ON MY OWN!

dialogue.speaker: Higuma
dialogue.text: It wouldn't do you any good. You're still too little!

dialogue.speaker: Higuma
dialogue.text: THERE'S NO WAY YOU CAN BECOME A PIRATE!

dialogue.speaker: Makino
dialogue.text: OHYES I WILL!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: One day I'll have a ship and crew better than yours!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: And we'll have the biggest Board of Treasure in the World!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'm gonna be King of the Pirates!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Hmm... you're gonna be better than us, huh?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: WELL THEM...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: DO ME A FAVOR...

dialogue.speaker: Makino
dialogue.text: Keep this hat safe for me?

dialogue.speaker: Makino
dialogue.text: This hat means a lot to me.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: PROMISE THAT YOU'LL GIVE IT BACK TO ME SOMEDAY...

dialogue.speaker: Higuma
dialogue.text: ...WHEN YOU'VE BECOME A GREAT PIRATE.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: THAT KID'S GONNA MAKE SOME- THING OF HIMSELF.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: YEAH...

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: HE ACTS JUST LIKE I DID WHEN I WAS A KID.

dialogue.speaker: Higuma
dialogue.text: WELGH THE ANCHOR!

dialogue.speaker: Higuma
dialogue.text: RAISE THE SAILS! WE'RE OFF WITH THE TIDE!!

summary: Shanks entrusts Luffy with the straw hat as a promise for the future. This moment turns Luffy’s dream into the core vow that will define his journey.
